 ?: help  │  1-2: tabs  │  tab/shift+tab: panels  │  c: compose  │  S: settings  │  h/left/[: folders
 l/right/]: preview  │  G: group  │  ↑/k ↓/j: navigate  │  ctrl+d/u: half-page  │  space: select  │  shift+↑/↓: range
